notes: Core mechanics partially work but pac-man draws with a +48 pixel offset bug making it appear off-screen, ghost house logic is broken, maze rendering uses strokeRect instead of filled walls giving a non-authentic look, and collision detection using pixel distance is unreliable.

Solid core Pac-Man loop with pellets, ghosts, fright mode, lives, and win/lose states, but several inaccuracies and likely edge-case bugs in ghost AI/house logic, maze rendering fidelity, and movement/collision polish keep it well short of a high score.
